  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Collaborative Filtering

library(Metrics)
library(ggplot2)
df_na <- read.csv('cleanedcf.csv', row.names = 'airport')
df_filled <- read.csv('filledcf.csv', row.names = 'airport')
user_cf <- function(df, k) {
  # center data
  rm <- rowMeans(df, na.rm = T)
  #df_centered <- df
  #df_centered[is.na(df_centered)] <- rm[row(df_centered)][is.na(df_centered)]
  df_centered <- df_filled - rm
  
  # create empty similarity matrix
  sim_mat <- as.data.frame(matrix(0, nrow = nrow(df), ncol = nrow(df)))
  rownames(sim_mat) <- rownames(df)
  colnames(sim_mat) <- rownames(df)

  # fill similarity matrix
  for (r_airport in rownames(sim_mat)) {
    for (c_airport in colnames(sim_mat)) {
      x <- as.matrix(df_centered[r_airport, ])
      y <- as.matrix(df_centered[c_airport, ])
      
      num <- sum(x * y)
      den <- sqrt(sum(x * x)) * sqrt(sum(y * y))
      cosine_sim <- ifelse(den == 0, NA, num / den)
      
      sim_mat[r_airport, c_airport] <- cosine_sim
    }
  }
  
  # remove rows and columns in sim_mat that are completely NA
  sim_mat <- sim_mat[rowSums(!is.na(sim_mat)) > 0, ]
  sim_mat <- sim_mat[, colSums(!is.na(sim_mat)) > 0]
  
  # Min-Max scale similarity scores
  sim_mat[row(sim_mat) == col(sim_mat)] <- NA
  
  scale <- function(x) {
    if (min(x, na.rm = T) == max(x, na.rm = T)) {
      return(rep(0.5, length(x)))
    } else {
      return ((x - min(x, na.rm = T))/(max(x, na.rm = T) - min(x, na.rm = T)))
    }
  }
  
  sim_scores_scaled <- as.data.frame(t(apply(sim_mat, 1, scale)))

  preds <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = nrow(sim_scores_scaled), ncol = ncol(df_na)))
  colnames(preds) <- colnames(df_na)
  rownames(preds) <- rownames(sim_scores_scaled)
  
  for (airport in rownames(sim_scores_scaled)) {
    # find missing columns for target airport, weights for k most similar airports, and most similar airports
    missing_carrier <- df[airport, sapply(df, anyNA)]
    
    airport_sim_scores <- as.numeric(sim_scores_scaled[airport, ])
    names(airport_sim_scores) <- rownames(sim_scores_scaled)
    
    pred_weight <- sort(airport_sim_scores, decreasing = T)[1:k]
    sim_airport <- names(sort(airport_sim_scores, decreasing = T))[1:k]
    
    airport_pred <- df[airport, ]
  
    for (col in colnames(missing_carrier)) {
      pred_delay <- NULL
      
      # find delay for the missing carrier and most similar airports (if carrier is also missing for most similar airport, use similar airport delay mean)
      for (sim in sim_airport) {
        if (is.na(df[sim, col])) {
          pred_delay <- c(pred_delay, mean(as.numeric(df[sim, ]), na.rm = T))
        } else {
          pred_delay <- c(pred_delay, as.numeric(df[sim, col]))
        }
      }
      
      # calculate predicted delay
      pred_weight <- as.numeric(pred_weight)
      
      col_pred <- sum(pred_delay * pred_weight) / sum(pred_weight) 
      airport_pred[1, col] <- col_pred
    }
  
    preds[airport, ] <- airport_pred
  }
  return(preds)
}

preds <- user_cf(df=df_na, k=3)
total_cf <- function(df, k) {
  # center data
  rm <- rowMeans(df, na.rm = T)
  df_centered <- df_filled - rm
  
  # create empty similarity matrix
  sim_mat <- as.data.frame(matrix(0, nrow = nrow(df), ncol = nrow(df)))
  rownames(sim_mat) <- rownames(df)
  colnames(sim_mat) <- rownames(df)

  # fill similarity matrix
  for (r_airport in rownames(sim_mat)) {
    for (c_airport in colnames(sim_mat)) {
      x <- as.matrix(df_centered[r_airport, ])
      y <- as.matrix(df_centered[c_airport, ])
      
      num <- sum(x * y)
      den <- sqrt(sum(x * x)) * sqrt(sum(y * y))
      cosine_sim <- ifelse(den == 0, NA, num / den)
      
      sim_mat[r_airport, c_airport] <- cosine_sim
    }
  }
  
  # remove rows and columns in sim_mat that are completely NA
  sim_mat <- sim_mat[rowSums(!is.na(sim_mat)) > 0, ]
  sim_mat <- sim_mat[, colSums(!is.na(sim_mat)) > 0]
  
  # Min-Max scale similarity scores
  sim_mat[row(sim_mat) == col(sim_mat)] <- NA
  
  scale <- function(x) {
    if (min(x, na.rm = T) == max(x, na.rm = T)) {
      return(rep(0.5, length(x)))
    } else {
      return ((x - min(x, na.rm = T))/(max(x, na.rm = T) - min(x, na.rm = T)))
    }
  }
  
  sim_scores_scaled <- as.data.frame(t(apply(sim_mat, 1, scale)))

  preds <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = nrow(sim_scores_scaled), ncol = ncol(df_na)))
  colnames(preds) <- colnames(df_na)
  rownames(preds) <- rownames(sim_scores_scaled)
  
  for (airport in rownames(sim_scores_scaled)) {
    
    airport_sim_scores <- as.numeric(sim_scores_scaled[airport, ])
    names(airport_sim_scores) <- rownames(sim_scores_scaled)
    
    pred_weight <- sort(airport_sim_scores, decreasing = T)[1:k]
    sim_airport <- names(sort(airport_sim_scores, decreasing = T))[1:k]
    
    airport_pred <- df[airport, ]
  
    for (col in colnames(df)) {
      pred_delay <- NULL
      
      # find delay for the missing carrier and most similar airports (if carrier is also missing for most similar airport, use similar airport delay mean)
      for (sim in sim_airport) {
        if (is.na(df[sim, col])) {
          pred_delay <- c(pred_delay, mean(as.numeric(df[sim, ]), na.rm = T))
        } else {
          pred_delay <- c(pred_delay, as.numeric(df[sim, col]))
        }
      }
      
      # calculate predicted delay
      pred_weight <- as.numeric(pred_weight)
      
      col_pred <- sum(pred_delay * pred_weight) / sum(pred_weight) 
      airport_pred[1, col] <- col_pred
    }
  
    preds[airport, ] <- airport_pred
  }
  return(preds)
}

df_pred <- total_cf(df=df_na, k=3)


df_new_na <- df_na[rownames(df_pred), colnames(df_pred)]

not_na <- !is.na(df_new_na)

actual <- c(df_new_na[not_na])
predicted <- c(df_pred[not_na])

# Root Mean Squared Error
rmse_val <- rmse(actual, predicted)
# Mean Absolute Error
mae_val <- mae(as.numeric(actual), as.numeric(predicted))
# Mean Absolute Percentage Error
mape_val <- mape(as.numeric(actual), as.numeric(predicted))
plot_data <- data.frame(Actual = actual, Predicted = predicted )
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Actual, y = Predicted)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, color = "red") +
  labs(
    x = "Actual Delay", 
    y = "Predicted Delay", 
    title = "Actual vs. Predicted Delay"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()
